word.description: 32-bit signed integer data type, the standard register size in MIPS

half.description: 16-bit signed integer data type for halfword storage

byte.description: 8-bit unsigned integer data type for character and small integer storage

float.description: 32-bit IEEE 754 single-precision floating-point stored in FPU registers

double.description: 64-bit IEEE 754 double-precision floating-point using paired FPU registers

asciiz.description: Null-terminated ASCII string stored in the data segment

space.description: Allocates n bytes of uninitialized space in the data segment

register.description: 32 general-purpose 32-bit registers with conventional usage names
